name: evolve
description: Iterative TDD review→fix loop — critique, fan out fix agents, verify, gate hard calls to the human, keep tests green, commit per round

interface.shortDescription: Iterative TDD review→fix loop — critique, fan out fix agents, verify, gate hard
interface.longDescription: Iterative TDD review→fix loop — each round critiques the codebase, fans out fix agents over disjoint files, verifies, gates hard calls to the human, keeps tests green, and commits. Severity-based convergence with safety caps.
